generated_oml:
instance InsideIncubatorTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor placed inside the styrofoam box to monitor internal thermal dynamics for control and model calibration. Provides critical data for heatbed state estimation and anomaly detection."
    DTDFVocab:producedData InsideIncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OutsideIncubatorTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor positioned externally to measure ambient conditions, providing contextual data for thermal model calibration and environmental impact analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OutsideIncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InsideIncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InsideIncubatorTemperatureSensor
]

instance OutsideIncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OutsideIncubatorTemperatureSensor
]

instance DynamicThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simpler dynamic thermal model with two free parameters for approximating system magnitude and time scale. Used for temperature prediction in the incubator."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThermalModelCalibrationEnabler
]

instance DynamicThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Advanced dynamic thermal model with four free parameters for accurate prediction of thermal inertia of the heatbed. Recalibrated when new objects are introduced into the incubator."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThermalModelCalibrationEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterStateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model used for state estimation and anomaly detection by correlating measured sensor data with non-measured states (e.g., heatbed temperature)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimationEnabler
]

instance InsideIncubatorTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series temperature data collected from inside the incubator via InsideIncubatorTemperatureSensor. Used for real-time visualization, model calibration, and anomaly detection."
    DTDFVocab:fromData InsideIncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThermalModelCalibrationEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, RealTimeVisualizationEnabler
]

instance OutsideIncubatorTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series ambient temperature data collected from outside the incubator via OutsideIncubatorTemperatureSensor. Used for contextual analysis in thermal models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutsideIncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThermalModelCalibrationEnabler
]

instance ControllerCommandData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Control state data transmitted from the controller via RabbitMQ, including commands for heatbed and fan actuation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlOptimizationEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQCommunicationServer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker facilitating real-time synchronization and data exchange between low-level driver, controller, and Digital Twin components. Handles periodic sensor data uploads and actuator commands."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataSynchronizationService, ControlCommandService
]

instance ThermalModelCalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated calibration process using tracking simulator to update model parameters (e.g., Model B) based on real-time sensor data from the Physical Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance StateEstimationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation correlating measured data with non-measured states (e.g., heatbed temperature) for accurate state estimation and anomaly detection."
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database storing real-time incubator status data for visualization (e.g., temperature trends) and historical analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ControlOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Co-simulation platform enabling what-if scenarios for controller parameter tuning using historical and real-time data."
    DTDFVocab:enables ControllerOptimizationService
]

instance DataSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing real-time data flow between low-level driver, controller, and Digital Twin components via RabbitMQ."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataSynchronizationInsight
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing on-demand calibration of thermal models (e.g., Model B) using real-time sensor data from the Physical Twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAccuracyInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service estimating non-measured states (e.g., heatbed temperature) and detecting anomalies using Kalman filter."
    DTDFVocab:provides HeatbedStateInsight, ThermalAnomalyInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time visualization of incubator status (e.g., temperature trends) via dashboards."
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureTrendInsight
]

instance ControllerOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling controller parameter tuning through what-if simulations using co-simulation with historical/real-time data."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControllerParameterInsight
]

instance ElectricHeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electric heating element regulating temperature inside the incubator. Controlled via bang-bang logic with adjustable heating duration and waiting periods."
]

instance IncubatorFanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan distributing heated air within the insulated incubator container. Controlled via commands from the Digital Twin controller."
]

instance DataSynchronizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization status between Physical Twin sensors, controller, and Digital Twin components."
]

instance ModelAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Accuracy metrics of thermal models (A/B) after calibration with real-time sensor data."
]

instance HeatbedStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated heatbed temperature and thermal inertia derived from Kalman filter state estimation."
]

instance ThermalAnomalyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected thermal anomalies in the incubator environment based on sensor data correlation."
]

instance TemperatureTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical and real-time temperature trends inside and outside the incubator for monitoring and analysis."
]

instance ControllerParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized controller parameters (LL, UL, H, C) derived from what-if simulations."
]

instance ActivateHeatbedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to activate the electric heatbed for a specified duration."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFanSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to adjust fan speed for air distribution within the incubator."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RecalibrateModelBAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger for on-demand recalibration of DynamicThermalModelB when new objects are introduced into the incubator."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TriggerAnomalyResponseAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic response to detected thermal anomalies (e.g., adjusting controller parameters or alerting operators)."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BangBangControllerLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Statechart-based controller logic implementing bang-bang control with heating/waiting states. Defines LL, UL, H, and C parameters for temperature regulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlOptimizationEnabler
]

instance ControllerCommandDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BangBangControllerLogic
]

instance ControllerCommandData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the bang-bang controller logic for heatbed and fan actuation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerCommandDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQCommunicationServer
]

instance LowLevelDriverEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Embedded system (Raspberry Pi) periodically reading sensor data and executing actuator commands with safety checks."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataSynchronizationService
]

instance ControlCommandService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing actuator commands from the controller to the low-level driver via RabbitMQ."
    DTDFVocab:provides ActuatorCommandInsight
]

instance ActuatorCommandInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of actuator commands (heatbed/fan) executed by the low-level driver."
]

instance IncubatorDigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin environment for the incubator system, containing all sensing, modeling, and acting components."
    base:contains InsideIncubatorTemperatureSensor,
                OutsideIncubatorTemperatureSensor,
                ElectricHeatbedActuator,
                IncubatorFanActuator,
                RabbitMQCommunicationServer,
                LowLevelDriverEnabler,
                DynamicThermalModelA,
                DynamicThermalModelB,
                KalmanFilterStateEstimator,
                BangBangControllerLogic
]
